title: Aggregate MAX() function with COLLATE clause
key_bug_features: Aggregate MAX() function with COLLATE clause
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT COLLATE NOCASE, value INTEGER, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (name, value) VALUES ('Charlie', NULL);
SELECT MAX(value) COLLATE NOCASE FROM test_table;
